deepDive.title: Closing the Lab-to-Store Gap: A Data-Efficient Post-Training and Experience-Driven Learning VLA Framework for Retail Humanoids
deepDive.summary: This paper is a training infrastructure lead from the research stream. Closing the gap between benchmark performance and reliable real-world operation remains a central challenge for Vision-Language-Action (VLA) humanoid robots, which must handle execution errors, distribution shifts, and environmental variability. It gets the longer read because the public context is source-grounded and the item is close to the systems layer.
